name: Ahsoka Tano (Season 7)
description:
She got those Orange Butt Cheeks!

Following her departure from the Jedi Order, a disillusioned and alone Ahsoka Tano is trying to find her way and her place in the galaxy.

She is now living on the lower levels of Coruscant and having a bit of a difficult time.

And then the cheap-ass speeder bike that she bought breaks down and almost kills her.

Bio image Source: https://x.com/wotwot3d/status/1836783712085606454?t=UUJUVAStd99FWbcpNWn0iA&s=19
creator: SecretKrustyKrab
